title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: LEDDING LIBRARY DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily during the winter season. Provides access to Wi-Fi, computers, and public bathrooms. 10660 SE 21st Avenue Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Varies by site Hours: Monday/Thursday/Friday 10am-6pm, Tuesday-Wednesday 10am-7pm, Saturday-Sunday 10am-5pm Email (503) 786-7580 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 786-7580 Main phone Ledding Public Library Main phone (503) 786-7580 Ledding Public Library Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call ahead to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Short walking distance from Milwaukie Transit Center. Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
